title: Sentinel Verdict
description: The structured output of the Sentinel judge (rung 2). See docs/specs/v0.6/01-sentinel-spine.md.

decision.description: allow = benign in context; block = dangerous; escalate = genuinely uncertain, surface to the human (rung 3).

resolved_at_rung.description: Which rung produced the verdict. The judge.sh helper is rung 2.

reason.description: One plain-language sentence for a non-technical user. Must obey the banned-vocabulary rule (no 'sandbox', 'container', 'proxy', etc.).

evidence.description: Optional: fragment offsets / matched concepts, for the disarm diff + UI.
